demo.title: fee-router-deploy.ts

setup: Install: install the fee-router skill from https://github.com/BankrBot/skills/tree/main/fee-router
Configure a signer: set PRIVATE_KEY (any wallet that can send a normal tx works — Bankr's submit_raw_transaction included: to = the DeployerFactory, data = deploy(initCode), value = fee())
Edit RECIPIENTS + SHARES_BPS in the demo — basis points, sum must be exactly 10000, minimum 2 recipients, no duplicates, no zero address
Run the demo: it builds initCode = creation-bytecode.txt ++ abi.encode(address[],uint256[]) and reads your new splitter address from the factory's Deployed event
Route fees by plain transfer: send native ETH or any ERC20 straight to the splitter address
Payout anytime: release(token, account) or releaseAll(token) — permissionless, funds always go to the recipients; token = 0x0 is native
